body_txt: The villain is defeated, and the next time they are seen, if they are seen, as a form of Irony , they are performing menial tasks, sometimes (though not always) on their (no longer) own premises, such as where they work or live, often as a janitor or cleaning up animal dung, and almost always with a look of utter humiliation on their faces. Often may come during the end credits. A Sub-Trope of Cool and Unusual Punishment and Bad Job, Worse Uniform , the latter of which the villain may be forced to wear to add insult to injury. Also may be a form of Humiliation Conga , as the laborer may suffer further humiliation of some sort while laboring. See also Prisoner's Work and Working on the Chain Gang , where the hard labor is part of a criminal punishment. Contrast the Call to Agriculture —that's when manual labor comes after winning .
